description: §21.2 — an `export const greeting = ...` inside a `${ }` logic block is the canonical Form-2 export placement; E-IMPORT-001 stays silent.
rationale: §21.2 Form 2: `export const Name = ...` inside `${ }` is a well-placed export. E-IMPORT-001 fires ONLY for `export` outside a logic context; here it is inside one, so the code must not fire.
